affectedLayers: Claude Code plugin marketplace layout and Helm runtime scripts
owners: Codex main controller with fresh subagents per task
invariants: No fallback behavior; missing prerequisites must fail explicitly with blockers.
helm-core owns shared runtime and hooks; stage plugins own their own stage contracts.
compatBoundary: Existing Helm fixtures and command semantics must be either migrated or explicitly updated.
nonGoals: Do not implement unrelated product features outside the approved Helm plugin suite design.
